commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
import asyncio

from ipaddress import IPv4Address

from hyping.models.target import PingTarget


async def app() -> None:
    target = PingTarget(
        address=IPv4Address("1.1.1.1")
    )

    print(target)


def main() -> None:
    asyncio.run(app())


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
